chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett No.D-327 of 2022 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of main case 15.09.2025 Mr. Abdul Mujeeb Shaikh, Advocate along with respondent No.7 Syed Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General ************** Counsel for the respondent No.7, has filed comments/objections on behalf of the respondent No.7, same is taken on record. None present for the petitioner nor any intimation received. Record reflects that the instant Constitution Petition is pending since 2022 without any progress. No sincere efforts have been made by the petitioner to proceed with the matter. It appears that the petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in pursuing the instant petition. Accordingly, present Constitution Petition stands dismissed for non-prosecution. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
